items.title: Tamil Nadu scales up ABHA creation, 2.54 crore people covered so far

items.title: Two-year-old girl undergoes complex renal cancer surgery at Tiruchi’s Mahatma Gandhi Memorial GH
items.summary: The girl was diagnosed with a right-sided ‘Wilms tumour’, a malignant tumour arising from the right kidney and underwent a radical right nephrectomy with extensive lymph node dissection.

items.title: Cauvery Water Management Authority is meeting on Wednesday amid a growing deficit in water realisation by Tamil Nadu
